Student Dormitories

There are girls' and boys' dormitories within the Ibn Haldun University Complex, our main campus in Başakşehir, and 743 students, 361 girls and 382 boys, can stay in these separate dormitory buildings. Dormitory rooms are for 3 persons.

Every comfort has been considered for our students in the rooms and in our dormitories in general. In addition to private study areas, recreation areas, social-cultural activity areas and a library, there are aerobics rooms for girls and fitness centers for boys, as well as hobby kitchens inside the dormitory buildings.

An astroturf field, basketball court and tennis court are also available for the use of our students right next to the dormitory buildings. Students can also benefit from the Sports Center (

https://spormerkezi.ihu.edu.tr

), which is located close to the dormitory buildings and offers a wide range of sports infrastructure.

Various workshops can also be held in the dormitories in line with students' requests, and social and cultural activities are organized.

You can view our dormitories on our 360° Virtual Tour website:
